fields.name: accelX
fields.note: Gen4-VERIFIED (motion_capture.jsonl + gyro_calib 720deg rotations): 100 samples/axis @~100Hz (1 pkt/s), signed int16 LITTLE-endian. ACCEL scale 1/4096 LSB/g (sphere-fit |g|=0.99, residual 0.0%). GYRO scale 2000/32768 = 0.06104 deg/s/LSB = full-scale +/-2000 dps (16.4 LSB per deg/s); verified via controlled 720deg rotation (rotA = exact 16.4 LSB/dps; +/-~10% from turn-count precision). openwhoop's div-15 (0.0667) is within tolerance. Gaps [24:82],[682:685] + tail [1292:1917] (~36%) still unmapped.

fields.name: optical config header (UNKNOWN)
fields.note: Gen4-RE (optical_capture.jsonl): a SINGLE AC-coupled (DC-removed) PPG waveform, NOT 4 interleaved channels. Sample @ frame off 42, stride 4, bytes[0:3]=signed 24-bit LE, byte[3]=aux (status/exposure, UNKNOWN). ~419 samples/pkt @~437Hz. Finger phase = clean ~1Hz pulsatile (=green/HR LED); air phase flatlines. Red/IR/ambient NOT in this stream (only as DSP'd scalars in type-47 V24). Config header [15:42] and byte[3] UNKNOWN -> keep raw for those.
